# Default Theme — Design System

## 1. Visual Theme

Clean, minimal, professional. White background with dark text. Suitable for any
audience and context.

## 2. Color Palette

- Primary: `#333333` (dark charcoal for headings)
- Background: `#ffffff` (white)
- Text: `#111111` (near-black body text)
- Accent: `#0066cc` (blue for links and highlights)
- Surface: `#f5f5f5` (light grey for code blocks)

## 3. Typography

- Heading font: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
- Body font: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
- Heading size: 2.5rem
- Body size: 1.1rem
- Line height: 1.6

## 4. Components

- Code blocks: monospace font, light grey background, no border-radius
- Lists: simple bullet points, consistent spacing
- Tables: minimal borders, alternating row shading

## 5. Layout

- Single-column layout, centered content
- Max width: 1200px
- Standard padding: 40px horizontal, 20px vertical
- Grid: flexible, adapts to content

## 6. Depth

- Shadows: none (flat design)
- Border radius: 4px (subtle rounding on interactive elements)
- Z-index layers: standard stacking

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

**Do:**
- Use high contrast text-to-background ratios
- Keep slides to ≤40 words of body text
- Use speaker notes for detail

**Don't:**
- Use more than 2 font sizes per slide
- Add background images that reduce readability
- Use red/green pairs without shape distinction

## 8. Responsive

- Scales gracefully from 1024px to 4K
- Mobile: single column, larger tap targets
- Breakpoints: 768px, 1024px, 1440px

## 9. Agent Prompt Guide

When using this theme, instruct the AI agent to:
- Use short, punchy slide titles (3–6 words)
- Keep body text minimal (≤40 words per slide)
- Use the primary color (#333333) for emphasis
- Reserve the accent color (#0066cc) for key takeaways
